benefits.description: Very effective at suppressing hunger/taking the edge off hunger during a cut

side_effects.description: Appetite suppression was too strong; had to force feed to meet daily calorie and protein goals; forgot about meals and then binged on less ideal foods

protocol_notes: Had been cutting successfully without peptides for many months before trying Tirz. Protein intake dropped along with calories. Considering micro-dosing on next cut and being more mentally prepared about nutrition.
